sourceDescription: 5 photos from Vinci's Google Drive archive folder 'Vinci / _Archive / Received through 2026-07-08 - Not all processed / Not yet processed / quiz 6' (folder ID 1xqVJeYzptbFHHhs4Bw0ZPRbv6fY0DsBE). A completed, handwritten 'Review Quiz #6' (Water Survival, SHLSOS Course #549), 22 fill-in-the-blank questions across 5 pages -- same format as the quiz-review-1, quiz-3, and quiz-4 batches.
sourceCitation: SHLSOS Course No. 549 Water Survival, Review Quiz #6 handout, (c) 2024 The Seafarers Harry Lundeberg School of Seamanship, Piney Point, MD 20674.
purpose: Traceability record for this raw image batch. Adding an entry here does NOT add it to any live question or draft pack. An image only reaches a student when a question in src/content/course.json explicitly sets its "image" field to this file's publicPath -- none of the questions drafted from this batch use an image, since the source is handwritten essay-style text with no diagrams.

images.originalFolder: Vinci/_Archive/Received through 2026-07-08 - Not all processed/Not yet processed/quiz 6
images.notes: 'Review Quiz #6', page 1 of 5 -- title page plus questions 1-5 (grouping scattered liferafts, beach-landing procedure, cold-water/tropical-water liferaft adaptations, required PFD items). Clean page, no doodles.

images.originalFolder: Vinci/_Archive/Received through 2026-07-08 - Not all processed/Not yet processed/quiz 6
images.notes: 'Review Quiz #6', page 2 of 5 -- questions 6-10 (Type I lifejacket rationale, heavy-surf lifeboat landing, immersion suit air bladder, survival time without water, safest water-entry method with an oil fire). Questions 7, 8, and 9 were left BLANK by the student -- no answers, not guessed. Some unrelated pencil doodles (a sail-like sketch) near questions 6-7, don't overlap any text.
